translations.Jeder Balken zeigt die gemessene Netto-D: Each bar shows the measured net duration of a pipeline phase between phase_start and phase_end.
translations.Starke Unterschiede zwischen nominal ähn: Strong differences between nominally similar phases can indicate fallbacks, retries, or unstable input data.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Die teu: Good: The most expensive phases should be the expected ones, such as registration, local metrics, or reconstruction.
translations.<span class=\"neutral\">Neutral:</span>: Neutral: Individual long bars are normal when many frames, large images, or many tiles were processed.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Un: Attention: Disproportionately long scan, load, or PREWARP phases point more to I/O, path, or data layout issues than to image content.
translations.Der Funnel zeigt, wie viele Frames nach: The funnel shows how many frames remain after the main acceptance stages: detected, after scan/linearity, after registration, and optionally before synthesis.
translations.Damit wird sofort sichtbar, ob Verluste: This immediately shows whether losses happen early during intake or later due to registration and quality filters.
translations.Die Balkenfarbe codiert die Retention re: Bar color encodes retention relative to the initial amount: green = high, yellow = noticeable loss, red = critical loss.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Nur mod: Good: Only a moderate drop from left to right, especially between scan and registrable frames.
translations.<span class=\"neutral\">Neutral:</span>: Neutral: A small loss due to linearity checks or CC-based rejection is normal.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Ei: Attention: A strong drop before or after registration means a large part of the dataset was not robustly usable.
translations.Das Kreisdiagramm zerlegt die Gesamtmeng: The pie chart breaks the total into used frames and the main loss causes, such as linearity removal, identity fallback, or negative CC values.
translations.Es beantwortet damit nicht nur <em>wie v: It therefore answers not only how much was lost, but also why.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Grüner Anteil:</spa: Green share: Effectively used frames that contribute to the later pipeline stages.
translations.<span class=\"neutral\">Gelbe Anteile:</: Yellow shares: Borderline but typical losses due to registration or conservative filtering.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Große nicht-grüne Se: Attention: Large non-green segments indicate acquisition problems, clouds, drift, or weak registrability of the material.
translations.Der Plot zeigt den geschätzten Himmelshi: The plot shows the estimated sky background per frame separately for the R, G, and B channels.
translations.Er ist wichtig, um Transparenzwechsel, M: It is important for detecting transparency changes, moonlight, color gradients, and channel-dependent background shifts early.
translations.Die Normalisierung muss genau diese Unte: Normalization must compensate for exactly these differences later; the stronger the variation, the more important this step becomes.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Alle Ka: Good: All channels remain relatively stable and follow a similar shape.
translations.<span class=\"neutral\">Neutral:</span>: Neutral: A gentle shared drift across all channels often points to slow conditions such as increasing humidity or sky brightening.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> St: Attention: Strong jumps, decoupled channels, or large offset differences indicate clouds, gradients, or color casts in the data.
translations.Dies ist der globale Hintergrundschätzer: This is the global background estimator per frame for MONO data.
translations.Der Verlauf zeigt, ob der Datensatz über: The trend shows whether the dataset remained photometrically stable over the session.
translations.Zeigt den mittleren Hintergrund jedes Fr: Shows the mean background of each frame after the scan/metrics step.
translations.Der Plot beantwortet, wie stabil der Him: The plot answers how stable the sky background was over the session and which frames are photometrically unusual.
translations.Frames mit problematischem Hintergrund w: Frames with problematic background are penalized strongly later in the global weight.
translations.Dies ist ein robuster Rauschschätzer für: This is a robust noise estimator for each individual frame.
translations.Hohe Werte bedeuten nicht automatisch sc: High values do not automatically mean bad stars, but they do mean a worse signal-to-noise ratio and therefore lower usefulness in the stack.
translations.Die Gradientenenergie misst, wie viel St: Gradient energy measures how much structure, edge energy, and local detail contrast are present in the frame.
translations.Sie reagiert sowohl auf echte Schärfe al: It reacts both to real sharpness and to disturbing structures such as cloud edges and should therefore be read deliberately as a single metric, not as an overall grade.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Hohe We: Good: High values are only positive if FWHM, background, and noise also look plausibly good at the same time.
translations.<span class=\"neutral\">Neutral:</span>: Neutral: An isolated high gradient is not proof of quality, only a sign of abundant local structure.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Ho: Attention: High gradient spikes combined with poor background or high noise often come from clouds, gradients, or unstable structures rather than true image quality.
translations.Dies ist das kombinierte globale Qualitä: This is the combined global quality weight used later in the pipeline to evaluate the frame.
translations.Es verdichtet Hintergrund, Rauschen und: It condenses background, noise, and structural information into a single usefulness score and is therefore the cleaned overall statement about a frame's usability.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Hohe We: Good: High values mark frames where the overall combination of low background, low noise, and useful structure is right.
translations.<span class=\"neutral\">Neutral:</span>: Neutral: Some spread is normal under changing conditions because not every frame is equally good.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Vi: Attention: Many very low weights mean that a relevant part of the dataset is weak or problematic overall, even if some individual metrics looked good at times.
translations.Das Histogramm zeigt, wie die Einzelgewi: The histogram shows how the individual weights are distributed across all frames.
translations.Es hilft zu unterscheiden, ob der Datens: It helps distinguish whether the dataset is uniformly good, split into good and bad subsets, or broadly problematic.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Ein kom: Good: A compact peak in the upper range means uniformly good material.
translations.<span class=\"neutral\">Neutral:</span>: Neutral: A bimodal distribution often points to good and bad subsets within the same session.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Ei: Attention: A broad left tail or many very small weights indicate many weak frames.
translations.Die FWHM beschreibt die Sternbreite in P: FWHM describes star width in pixels and is one of the most direct sharpness indicators in the dataset.
translations.Niedrige FWHM bedeutet kompakte Sterne,: Low FWHM means compact stars, high FWHM stands for seeing, focus, or tracking problems.
translations.Die Rundheit beschreibt, wie kreisförmig: Roundness describes how circular the star profiles are; values near 1 are ideal.
translations.Sie reagiert besonders auf Trackingfehle: It reacts especially to tracking errors, wind, tilt, or systematic star elongation.
translations.Der Plot zeigt, wie viele Sterne im jewe: The plot shows how many stars were robustly detected in each frame.
translations.Er ist ein schneller Proxy für Transpare: It is a quick proxy for transparency, focus, and material usability.
translations.Jeder Punkt repräsentiert einen Frame. D: Each point represents one frame. Its position combines two central star-quality metrics: sharpness and shape.
translations.Die Farbskala folgt der Frame-Reihenfolg: The color scale follows frame order and thereby makes temporal drift visible.
translations.Ein systematischer Farbverlauf der Punkt: A systematic color progression of the points shows whether quality improved or deteriorated over the session.
translations.Die Grafik zeigt die reale Zerlegung des: The graphic shows the actual decomposition of the image into overlapping tiles.
translations.Dieses Raster ist die Grundlage für loka: This grid is the basis for local metrics, tile-specific weights, and later reconstruction.
translations.Mehr Tiles bedeuten feinere lokale Steue: More tiles mean finer local control but also more computation and bookkeeping overhead.
translations.Die Überlappung ist notwendig, damit bei: Overlap is necessary so no hard tile boundaries remain visible during assembly.
translations.Ein plausibles Raster deckt das gesamte: A plausible grid covers the whole image evenly and shows no obvious gaps.
translations.Jeder Punkt zeigt die erkannte Verschieb: Each point shows the detected shift of a frame relative to the reference frame in x and y.
translations.Die Farbskala transportiert die Reihenfo: The color scale carries frame order and helps identify drift patterns.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Kompakt: Good: A compact point cloud without major outliers.
translations.<span class=\"neutral\">Neutral:</span>: Neutral: A slow directional drift can be normal across a session.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Gr: Attention: Large spread or isolated clusters point to unstable guiding, wind, or problematic registration.
translations.Hier werden die Registrierungsverschiebu: Here the registration shifts are shown as time series separately for tx and ty.
translations.Das macht sichtbar, ob die Montierung gl: This shows whether the mount drifted smoothly or whether abrupt jumps occurred.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> St: Attention: Steps, jumps, or chaotic zigzag patterns indicate tracking or matching problems.
translations.Das Histogramm zeigt die Verteilung des: The histogram shows the distribution of the registration correlation coefficient across all frames.
translations.CC ist ein direkter Qualitätsindikator d: CC is a direct quality indicator of how reliably a frame could be matched to the reference image.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Hohe Ko: Good: High concentration at large CC values.
translations.<span class=\"neutral\">Neutral:</span>: Neutral: Some left tail is normal in difficult sessions.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Vi: Attention: Many low CC values mean numerous frames were hard to match geometrically or photometrically.
translations.Zeigt den relativen Rotationswinkel jede: Shows the relative rotation angle of each frame with respect to the reference frame.
translations.Besonders relevant bei Feldrotation, Alt: Especially relevant for field rotation, alt-az captures, or long sessions with rotational components.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Kleiner: Good: Small and smooth trend when little rotation is expected.
translations.<span class=\"neutral\">Neutral:</span>: Neutral: Uniform monotonic rotation can be physically normal.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Sp: Attention: Abrupt direction changes or strong outliers point more to registration instability than to true geometry.
translations.Der Plot zeigt, ob Frames relativ zum Re: The plot shows whether frames had to be enlarged or reduced relative to the reference frame.
translations.Skalendrift ist oft ein Hinweis auf Foku: Scale drift often indicates focus drift, atmospheric effects, or inconsistent geometry.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Werte n: Good: Values near 1 with low spread.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Sy: Attention: Systematic drift or strong outliers indicate optical or geometric instability.
translations.Diese Heatmap zeigt, in welchen Bildregi: This heatmap shows in which image regions stars are sharper or blurrier on average.
translations.Sie macht räumlich sichtbar, ob das Bild: It makes spatially visible whether the image field is focused evenly or whether edge/corner problems exist.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Homogen: Good: Homogeneous distribution without strong hotspots.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Lo: Attention: Local islands with high FWHM indicate field curvature, tilt, or position-dependent image-quality problems.
translations.Der Score aggregiert lokale Bildqualität: The score aggregates local image quality across all frames for each image region.
translations.Die Karte zeigt damit, wo die Pipeline i: The map therefore shows where the pipeline saw consistently good or weak material across the field.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Hohe un: Good: High and relatively uniform quality across the field.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> De: Attention: Strong spots or gradients show spatially uneven data quality.
translations.Diese Heatmap zeigt, welche Tiles im Mit: This heatmap shows which tiles contribute strongly or weakly on average to local reconstruction.
translations.Sie ist besonders wichtig, um zu sehen,: It is especially important for seeing whether individual image regions are systematically underweighted.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Plausib: Good: Plausible differences without extreme zero or hotspot zones.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Se: Attention: Very weak regions mark field areas with persistently poor local usability.
translations.Hier wird sichtbar, welche Tiles im Mitt: This shows which tiles contain many or few detectable stars on average.
translations.Das ist sowohl feldabhängig als auch qua: This depends both on field content and quality and explains differences in local stability.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Sternre: Good: Star-rich regions provide robust local metrics.
translations.<span class=\"neutral\">Neutral:</span>: Neutral: Star-poor background or nebula regions are not automatically bad, but they are statistically less supported.
translations.Die Karte visualisiert die Tile-Klassifi: The map visualizes the tile classification of the local metrics stage, for example star-driven versus structure/background-dominated.
translations.Sie hilft zu verstehen, warum verschiede: It helps explain why different regions are weighted or processed differently later.
translations.Helle Tiles markieren typischerweise Ste: Bright tiles typically mark star/structure mode.
translations.Ein plausibles Muster folgt grob dem Bil: A plausible pattern roughly follows image content; chaotic classification can indicate unstable local metrics.
translations.Die beiden Kurven mitteln lokale Qualitä: The two curves average local quality and local weight per frame across the whole field.
translations.Damit wird sichtbar, wie sich die lokale: This shows how local field quality evolves over time without having to inspect individual tiles in isolation.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Beide K: Good: Both curves remain relatively stable and plausibly follow the course of the session.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> St: Attention: Strong collapses mark frames in which local image quality failed across wide areas.
translations.Diese Karte zeigt, wie viele Einzelbilde: This map shows how many individual frames per tile effectively entered reconstruction after all relevant filters.
translations.Sie macht sichtbar, wo die Pipeline loka: It shows where the pipeline is locally supported by strong statistics and where support is thinner.
translations.Wenn die Karte nahezu einfarbig ist, bed: If the map is nearly monochrome, that usually really means uniform coverage here and not automatically a rendering issue.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Möglich: Good: Counts should be as homogeneous and sufficiently high as possible.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Ti: Attention: Tiles with very low counts are locally more fragile and can carry bias or artifact risk.
translations.Zeigt die mittlere Ähnlichkeit der in ei: Shows the mean similarity of frame contributions entering a tile.
translations.Hohe Werte bedeuten lokal konsistente Ge: High values indicate locally consistent geometry and signal structure.
translations.Wenn die Karte überall fast identisch au: If the map looks almost identical everywhere or numerically saturates at 1.0, this metric is barely discriminative in this run and no longer separates tiles visibly.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Lo: Attention: Local CC dropouts indicate problematic alignment or changing local data quality.
translations.Diese Heatmap zeigt einen tileweisen SNR: This heatmap shows a per-tile SNR proxy after local reconstruction.
translations.Sie beantwortet, in welchen Bildbereiche: It answers in which image regions reconstruction is statistically strong or weak.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Hohe We: Good: High values in signal-rich regions without implausible blotches.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Se: Attention: Very low or strongly inhomogeneous SNR patterns can indicate unstable tile contributions.
translations.Der Plot zeigt, wie stark der lokale Kon: This plot shows how strong the local contrast is after reconstruction.
translations.Er hilft dabei, flache Regionen von deta: It helps distinguish flat regions from detailed and possibly overemphasized regions.
translations.Anders als Counts oder CC ist diese Kart: Unlike counts or CC, this map is typically not homogeneous: the target itself creates real spatial contrast differences across the field.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Kontras: Good: Contrast follows the target and appears plausibly distributed across the field.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Is: Attention: Isolated contrast islands or hard differences between neighboring tiles can indicate reconstruction artifacts.
translations.Diese Karte zeigt den lokalen Hintergrun: This map shows the local background after reconstruction.
translations.Sie ist wichtig, um Restgradienten oder: It is important for making residual gradients or tile-wise offset differences visible.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Rä: Attention: Spatial background jumps can later create visible tile or gradient artifacts.
translations.Histogramm der effektiven Beitragshäufig: Histogram of the effective contribution count per tile.
translations.Es zeigt, ob wenige Tiles statistisch au: It shows whether a few tiles are statistical outliers or whether reconstruction is broadly supported.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Konzent: Good: Concentration in a plausible range that is not too low.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Ei: Attention: A strong left tail shows many weakly supported tiles.
translations.Zeigt, wie sich die mittlere Tile-Korrel: Shows how mean tile correlation is distributed across the whole field.
translations.Damit lässt sich erkennen, ob lokale Aus: This helps reveal whether local alignment/consistency is robust across large areas or only in parts.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Schwerp: Good: Center of mass at high values.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Br: Attention: A broad distribution or many low values indicate weak per-tile consistency.
translations.Dieses Histogramm verdichtet den tilewei: This histogram condenses the per-tile SNR proxy into a global overview.
translations.Es hilft zu sehen, ob die Rekonstruktion: It helps show whether reconstruction is robust overall or only strong in partial regions.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Solider: Good: Solid center without a long low-SNR tail.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Vi: Attention: Many tiles with weak SNR reduce the stability of the final result.
translations.Jeder Balken zeigt, wie viele Frames ein: Each bar shows how many frames were assigned to a clustering state or quality cluster.
translations.Der Plot beantwortet, ob die Session aus: The plot answers whether the session consists of a few dominant states or many small subgroups.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Plausib: Good: Plausible cluster distribution without an unexplained flood of tiny clusters.
translations.<span class=\"neutral\">Neutral:</span>: Neutral: Uneven clusters are normal when weather or quality phases had different durations.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Vi: Attention: Many very small clusters can indicate unstable features or overly sensitive clustering.
translations.Die Zeitreihe zeigt für jeden Frame, wel: The time series shows for each frame which cluster it was assigned to.
translations.So wird sichtbar, ob Cluster echte Sessi: This reveals whether clusters represent real session phases or merely appear as mixed noise.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Längere: Good: Longer connected blocks can represent real state phases of the session.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> St: Attention: Strong back-and-forth switching between clusters in short succession points more to noisy features than to stable states.
translations.Jeder Balken entspricht einem synthetisc: Each bar corresponds to a synthetic frame or the underlying cluster quality score.
translations.Der Plot zeigt, welche Cluster spaeter b: The plot shows which clusters later contribute particularly strongly or weakly to final aggregation.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Mehrere: Good: Multiple solid clusters with plausible quality.
translations.<span class=\"neutral\">Neutral:</span>: Neutral: Individual weak clusters are tolerable if strong clusters dominate.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Üb: Attention: Predominantly weak or highly scattered cluster quality reduces the usefulness of synthesis.
translations.Dieser Balkenplot zeigt die additive Hin: This bar plot shows the additive background shift that BGE had to estimate per channel.
translations.Er beschreibt also, wie stark der lokale: It therefore describes how strongly the local background was offset before correction.
translations.Größere Werte bedeuten stärkere Korrektu: Larger values mean stronger correction interventions.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Se: Attention: Very uneven channels or extreme shifts point to strong gradient or color-background problems.
translations.Zeigt die Streuung der Residuen an den B: Shows the spread of residuals at the BGE support points after fitting.
translations.Damit wird bewertet, wie sauber das Mode: This evaluates how cleanly the model could explain the background.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Kleine: Good: Small residual std means a calm, consistent residual error.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Ho: Attention: High residuals point to overly complex structure, too few valid samples, or an unsuitable model.
translations.Dieser Plot zeigt, welcher Anteil der th: This plot shows which share of the theoretically available BGE samples per channel actually entered the fit as valid.
translations.Ein niedriger Anteil bedeutet, dass der: A low share means the fit had to rely on weakly supported support points.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Hoher g: Good: High valid share per channel.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Ni: Attention: Low values reduce stability and can leave residual gradients.
translations.Die Balken zeigen die wichtigsten numeri: The bars show the most important numerical end checks of the result, for example FWHM improvement, tile-weight variance, and optionally the tile-pattern check.
translations.Die Farbe macht sofort sichtbar, welche: Color immediately shows which checks passed and which failed.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gruen:</span> Der j: Green: The respective check is within the accepted range.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Rot:</span> Der Chec: Red: The check failed and marks a qualitative risk of the final product.
translations.Die absolute Balkenhoehe ist nur im Kont: Absolute bar height is only interpretable in the context of the respective check; the important thing is the combination of value and PASS/FAIL.
translations.Das Histogramm beschreibt, welcher Antei: The histogram describes which fraction of pixels per tile lies in the common region that overlaps stably across all usable frames.
translations.Es ist damit ein wichtiger Indikator für: It is therefore an important indicator of geometric coverage and statistical fairness of local metrics.
translations.<span class=\"good\">Gut:</span> Schwerp: Good: A center near high ratios means stable common coverage.
translations.<span class=\"neutral\">Neutral:</span>: Neutral: Edge falloff is typical with field rotation or uneven coverage.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> Vi: Attention: Many low ratios mean large parts of the field were only weakly observed together locally.
translations.Diese Karte zeigt die gemeinsame Abdecku: This map shows the common coverage not as a distribution but directly at the real image position of each tile.
translations.Damit erkennt man sofort, welche Feldber: This immediately shows which field regions are geometrically well supported and where the session thins out locally.
translations.<span class=\"neutral\">Neutral:</span>: Neutral: Falloff at the edges is often physically normal.
translations.<span class=\"bad\">Auffällig:</span> In: Attention: Island-like gaps or strong inhomogeneity can later cause local bias and reconstruction problems.
